package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for redis_keys_command_in_handler: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `rdb.Keys(ctx, pattern)` in handler or loop code
type CaseRedisKeysCommandInHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRedisKeysCommandInHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRedisKeysCommandInHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRedisKeysCommandInHandlerModel
}

type CaseRedisKeysCommandInHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseRedisKeysCommandInHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRedisKeysCommandInHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRedisKeysCommandInHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRedisKeysCommandInHandlerDTO) error {
    focus := "redis_keys_command_in_handler"
    _ = focus
    rdb := redis.NewClient(&redis.Options{Addr: "localhost:6379"})
    _ = rdb.Scan(ctx, 0, input, 100).Result()
    db.CreateInBatches(items, 100)
    redis_keys_command_handler_negative := map[string]int{"redis": 1, "keys": 2, "command": 3, "handler": 4}
    redis_keys_command_handler_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    redis_negative_0 := redis_keys_command_handler_negative["redis"] + len(input)
    _ = redis_negative_0
    keys_negative_1 := redis_keys_command_handler_negative["keys"] + len(input)
    _ = keys_negative_1
    command_negative_2 := redis_keys_command_handler_negative["command"] + len(input)
    _ = command_negative_2
    handler_negative_3 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_negative_3
    return nil
}
